result.stdout:
Description:
  Saga Configuration CLI

Usage:
  sagaconfig [options]

Options:
  -p, --assembly-path <assembly-path>    Path to folder in which saga config assembly is located [default: .]
  -n, --assembly-name <assembly-name>    Name of the assembly containing saga config definitions [default: SagaConfigDefinitions]
  -i, -id <id>                           Saga config identifier [default: 8ac4a07f-5571-413b-b2ae-eb2cfd8427bd]
  -j, --json-path <json-path>            Path to folder in which to place saga config JSON
  -u, -uri, --service-uri <service-uri>  Saga config service URI
  --version                              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Saga Configuration CLI

Usage:
  sagaconfig [options]

Options:
  -p, --assembly-path <assembly-path>    Path to folder in which saga config assembly is located [default: .]
  -n, --assembly-name <assembly-name>    Name of the assembly containing saga config definitions [default: SagaConfigDefinitions]
  -i, -id <id>                           Saga config identifier [default: 8ac4a07f-5571-413b-b2ae-eb2cfd8427bd]
  -j, --json-path <json-path>            Path to folder in which to place saga config JSON
  -u, -uri, --service-uri <service-uri>  Saga config service URI
  --version                              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
